name: utopia-cms
description: Flutter CMS and admin-panel patterns with utopia_cms. CmsWidget shell, CmsTablePage, CmsDelegate integrations, CmsEntry catalog, filters, custom actions, and management sections.

interface.shortDescription: Flutter CMS and admin-panel patterns for utopia_cms.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through Flutter CMS and admin-panel work with utopia_cms: CmsWidget shells, CmsTablePage tables, CmsDelegate integrations for Firebase, Supabase, Hasura, and GraphQL, CmsEntry catalogs, filters, row actions, and management sections.
defaultPrompt: Review an admin screen for utopia_cms anti-patterns.
Add a CmsTablePage with filters and actions.
